title: IIM Bangalore is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIM Bangalore is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIM Bangalore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Bangalore:
IIM Bangalore is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore!
